phase4.plannedReason: Foundational invariants document (Concordium never revoked, 18-concept denominator freeze, non-scored Writing Try, release-id impact none, shared confidence taxonomy). Cited by every downstream P4 unit and by the concordium property test that enforces the scope lock.

Rename the legacy stats.templates field in the production-smoke contract to stats.templateTotals and strip the deprecated alias defensively on read so pre-P4 persisted state keeps parsing without a backfill migration. Regression-locks the rename against future drift.

phase4.topic: Harden Phase 3 scopers — fail loud on DOM drift
phase4.plannedReason: Replace silent-fallback scopers across nine Phase 3 render helpers with loud throws keyed on data-grammar-phase-root attributes, so any future DOM refactor that breaks a phase selector fails the test suite instead of silently reading the wrong subtree.

Property-test suite covering every state writer end-to-end (engine, mastery, shared normaliser, projections). Locks GRAMMAR_AGGREGATE_CONCEPTS.length === 18 as the denominator floor and proves that no answer sequence can revoke a previously-awarded Concordium stage. Reward wiring tests verify monotonicity and self-heal behaviour.

Parametrised matrix across session-ui, grammar-view-model, GrammarSessionScene, GrammarMiniTestReview and engine commands — covers every pre-answer / post-answer-correct / post-answer-wrong transition plus mini-test strictness. Reuses the Phase 3 forbidden-term fixture for child-copy sweep across the expanded flow set.

phase4.topic: Grammar Bank focus allowlist + Mixed practice label
phase4.plannedReason: Grammar Bank Practise-this routing honours an explicit focus-concept allowlist and relabels mixed rounds to avoid false-grade affordances. Refusal path routes through translateGrammarSessionError for child-friendly messaging. Regression-locked against silent override.

Deterministic-seed simulation harness exercises selection.js across 1000+ adaptive rounds, asserting due-outranks-new, template-diversity floors, and mini-test-vs-normal divergence. Surfaces selection-engine regressions before they reach learners.

phase4.topic: Parent/Admin hub confidence chips + sample-size context
phase4.plannedReason: Extends client-side buildGrammarLearnerReadModel with a Worker-matching confidence projection so Parent Hub and Admin Hub render confidence chips alongside sample-size context. Regression-locked against existing concept-status, accuracy, and evidence fields to prevent drift.

Consolidates confidence-label derivation into a single shared/grammar/confidence.js module consumed by Worker emission, adult client read-model, and child view-model. Eliminates the threshold divergence between Worker engine.js and client read-model.js. One-time refactor, drift-free thereafter.

Deterministic-seed Playwright scenes cover cross-layer behaviour unit tests cannot (focus motion, timer drift, pointer capture, IME, scrollIntoView) across desktop and mobile viewports. Gates regression on every Grammar-touching PR.

phase4.topic: Writing Try hide/archive/delete via admin HTTP routes
phase4.plannedReason: First admin-scoped subject-data HTTP routes in the repo: child hide (prefs.transferHiddenPromptIds), admin archive (state.transferEvidenceArchive), admin delete. Non-scored invariant preserved — zero mutations on mastery, rewards, retryQueue, misconceptions. Security-locked against non-admin callers.

Inventory audit of every template's answer-spec declaration readiness ahead of Phase 5 migration. Doc-gate test asserts audit docs match content.js ground truth at commit time so drift between audit and live templates cannot go unnoticed.

Phase 5 content-expansion backlog ordered by priority, with explicit callouts of the GRAMMAR_AGGREGATE_CONCEPTS denominator trap (any expansion to 19 concepts must pair with a stage-monotonicity shim). Doc-gate test preserves the release-id bump instruction for Phase 5.

invariants.name: concordium-never-revoked
invariants.plannedReason: Property-test covering every writer (engine, mastery, shared, projections) proves no answer sequence revokes a previously-awarded Concordium stage. Denominator floor pinned at GRAMMAR_AGGREGATE_CONCEPTS.length === 18 to block silent revocation on future content expansion.

invariants.name: confidence-label-shared-module
invariants.plannedReason: Single source of truth for Grammar confidence-label derivation consumed by Worker emission, adult client read-model, and child view-model. Eliminates the Worker-vs-client threshold divergence and regression-locks the shared module against future forks.

invariants.name: release-id-impact-none
invariants.plannedReason: Phase 4 must not bump GRAMMAR_CONTENT_RELEASE_ID. grammar-engine.test.js + grammar-functionality-completeness.test.js pin the id against the legacy oracle and completeness baseline; grammar-production-smoke.test.js pins it in the shipped smoke contract. Three independent anchors keep Phase 4 scope-locked.

phase4ReleaseGate.description: Phase 4 completeness gate: every P4 unit row (U0-U12) and every cross-cutting invariant row recorded completed with landedIn PR and supporting test files existing on disk. Structurally refuses any future 'planned' row or missing-test regression.
